plugins.name: jira-multi
plugins.description: Multi-site Jira/Confluence: one token-based MCP server for all your Atlassian sites, folder→account auto-resolution, zero OAuth re-authentication. Includes Jira skills (setup/init/adhoc/plan/release/sync) and Lark Suite/Feishu task+docs support via the official lark-openapi-mcp.
